records.question: Which students named Emma Frederic Rohan with email derrick.jenkins@example.com and cell number 235.899.9744 first rented on 2017-12-05 15:20:04 and left the university on or after 2018-03-03 03:33:05?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT students.student_id FROM students
WHERE students.date_first_rental = '2017-12-05 15:20:04' AND students.date_left_university >= '2018-03-03 03:33:05' AND students.email_address = 'derrick.jenkins@example.com' AND students.middle_name = 'Frederic' AND students.last_name = 'Rohan' AND students.cell_mobile_number = '235.899.9744' AND students.first_name = 'Emma'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT student_id
FROM Students
WHERE first_name = 'Emma' 
  AND middle_name = 'Frederic' 
  AND last_name = 'Rohan'
  AND email_address = 'derrick.jenkins@example.com'
  AND cell_mobile_number = '235.899.9744'
  AND date_first_rental = '2017-12-05 15:20:04'
  AND date_left_university >= '2018-03-03 03:33:05'

records.question: Which students with the last name Gottlieb and email address dicki.kathryne@example.org started living in New Annabellefort on or before 2017-03-29 18:22:55 and left the university on or before 2018-03-18 16:07:42?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT students.student_id FROM students
JOIN addresses ON students.address_id = addresses.address_id
JOIN student_addresses ON students.student_id = student_addresses.student_id
WHERE students.email_address = 'dicki.kathryne@example.org' AND students.last_name = 'Gottlieb' AND student_addresses.date_address_from <= '2017-03-29 18:22:55' AND addresses.city = 'New Annabellefort' AND students.date_left_university <= '2018-03-18 16:07:42'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id
FROM Students s
JOIN Student_Addresses sa ON s.student_id = sa.student_id
JOIN Addresses a ON sa.address_id = a.address_id
WHERE s.last_name = 'Gottlieb'
AND s.email_address = 'dicki.kathryne@example.org'
AND a.city = 'New Annabellefort'
AND sa.date_address_from <= '2017-03-29 18:22:55'
AND s.date_left_university <= '2018-03-18 16:07:42'

records.question: Which students with first name Misael and last name Will, email gbeatty@example.com, cell number (062)892-7033, who left the university on or after 2018-03-18 07:01:27, live at 654 Fisher Roads?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT students.student_id FROM students
JOIN addresses ON students.address_id = addresses.address_id
WHERE students.date_left_university >= '2018-03-18 07:01:27' AND students.email_address = 'gbeatty@example.com' AND students.cell_mobile_number = '(062)892-7033' AND students.last_name = 'Will' AND students.first_name = 'Misael' AND addresses.line_1 = '654 Fisher Roads'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id
FROM Students s
JOIN Addresses a ON s.address_id = a.address_id
WHERE s.first_name = 'Misael'
  AND s.last_name = 'Will'
  AND s.email_address = 'gbeatty@example.com'
  AND s.cell_mobile_number = '(062)892-7033'
  AND s.date_left_university >= '2018-03-18 07:01:27'
  AND a.line_1 = '654 Fisher Roads'

records.question: Which students named Misael with middle name Justyn first rented on or after 2017-10-15 06:52:46, left university exactly on 2018-03-18 07:01:27, have behavior incidents ending exactly on 2018-03-18 18:40:05, and assessment notes dated on or before 2014-04-28 02:07:53?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT students.student_id FROM students
JOIN assessment_notes ON students.student_id = assessment_notes.student_id
JOIN behavior_incident ON students.student_id = behavior_incident.student_id
WHERE students.date_first_rental >= '2017-10-15 06:52:46' AND students.middle_name = 'Justyn' AND behavior_incident.date_incident_end = '2018-03-18 18:40:05' AND assessment_notes.date_of_notes <= '2014-04-28 02:07:53' AND students.date_left_university = '2018-03-18 07:01:27' AND students.first_name = 'Misael'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id
FROM Students s
JOIN Behavior_Incident bi ON s.student_id = bi.student_id
JOIN Assessment_Notes an ON s.student_id = an.student_id
WHERE s.first_name = 'Misael'
AND s.middle_name = 'Justyn'
AND s.date_first_rental >= '2017-10-15 06:52:46'
AND s.date_left_university = '2018-03-18 07:01:27'
AND bi.date_incident_end = '2018-03-18 18:40:05'
AND an.date_of_notes <= '2014-04-28 02:07:53'
